title: hieracium isatifolium subsp. orthophyllum
intro: Hieracium isatifolium subsp. orthophyllum, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion-like hawkweed genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, derived from its leaf and flower extracts. The health benefits of Hieracium isatifolium subsp. orthophyllum include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable asset in traditional herbal medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in treating various health conditions.
